name: Sizzling Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the cooked rice on a greased baking pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 2 hours or until fried and browned, stirring occasionally. Set aside.
3. In a large soup pot or Dutch oven, combine the broth, chicken, mushrooms, onions, bamboo shoots, water chestnuts, bouillon, and garlic powder. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
4. Add peas; cook for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Just before serving, heat oil in a skillet. Fry the rice in hot oil until it is slightly puffed.
6. Ladle soup into serving bowls. Immediately spoon some hot rice into each bowl to create a sizzling effect.
